footer.about: IT consultancy for design and development of high-performance digital ecosystems. Specialized in scalable architectures and premium user interfaces.

hero.lead: Scalable software engineering for Large Corporations and tailored digitalization solutions for SMEs. Secure your digital future with a Senior approach.

engagement.lead: Whether you need to scale an enterprise architecture or eliminate manual processes in your SME, I have the skills to transform your vision into a winning technological solution.

pmi.lead: I transform your manual processes into digital systems that work for you. Less bureaucracy, more time for your business.

item1.title: Premium Websites & E-commerce
item1.desc: Professional online presence designed to convert visitors into real customers.

item2.title: Online Booking Systems
item2.desc: Eliminate routine phone calls. Allow your customers to book 24/7 in total autonomy.

item3.title: Internal Process Automation
item3.desc: Forget Excel sheets. I digitalize your order management, warehouse, or billing.

enterprise.lead: Senior consultancy for complex architectures that require the highest level of scalability, security, and performance.

item1.title: Software Architecture Design
item1.desc: Design of resilient and Cloud-native microservices systems ready for enterprise volumes.

item2.title: Security & Compliance (DORA/GDPR)
item2.desc: Audit and implementation of rigorous standards for the protection of critical assets and sensitive data.

item3.title: Tech Stack Modernization
item3.desc: Elimination of technical debt and assisted migration from legacy systems to modern technologies.

pricing.lead: From the digitalization of your local business to the scalability of a global enterprise infrastructure.

plan1.name: Digital Core (SME)
plan1.description: Transform your online presence with a premium site optimized for conversion.
plan1.footer: Ideal for professionals and local businesses

plan2.name: SaaS & Automation
plan2.description: Custom web apps, booking systems, and business process automation.

plan3.name: Enterprise Strategy
plan3.description: Senior consultancy for architectures, security, and complex systems modernization.

partners.lead: Experience gained collaborating with technological partners and leading companies in the Fintech, Retail, and Services sectors.

problems.lead: Obsolete systems and manual processes are not just a cost, they are a brake on your growth.

pmi.title: For your SME
items: Manual management on Excel and paper sheets causing errors and delays.
Lost customers because they cannot book or buy online 24/7.
Slow or dated website that drives away potential partners.
Dependency on continuous phone calls for simple routine information.

enterprise.title: For Large Corporations
items: Accumulated technical debt that blocks innovation and new releases.
Architectures that do not scale as traffic volumes increase.
Security flaws and lack of compliance with modern standards.
Inaccessible data silos and lack of automation between systems.

portfolio.lead: Real solutions for concrete technological challenges.

project1.desc: Digital transformation of a traditional tourist service: from manual management to an ecosystem with online booking and contact automation.

project2.desc: Custom software for the construction sector that automates complex calculations and quote generation, reducing response times by 80%.

recommendations.title: What they say about me
recommendations.lead: Professional references collected on LinkedIn from colleagues and managers.

rec1.text: I had the pleasure of working with Max at Accenture and I can say he is a truly capable professional. He is always available to help colleagues and share his knowledge, creating a positive and collaborative work environment, which is not at all obvious. Max is a resource that either you have or you must have!
highlights: resource that either you have or you must have!

rec2.text: I was lucky enough to work with Max in the same team at Accenture. What can I say, Max is a perfect colleague. He is always ready to help others in times of need and has solid back-end experience with a great problem-solving capacity. An added value to the team without a shadow of a doubt.

rec3.text: Max is a proactive and precise professional, showing incessant intellectual curiosity and a meticulous approach that ensures the highest quality of the work performed. His reliability and availability, both from a professional and human point of view, are an added value for the team.

rec4.context: Worked with Max in different teams
rec4.text: Max is a person with significant experience abroad, his path allowed him to have an open mind and a remarkable curiosity allowing him but also the rest of the team, to have a problem-solving capacity outside the box. He is energetic, spontaneous, competent, collaborative, makes you feel involved but above all I have seen him many times helping other team members and this denotes capacity for group spirit and generosity. I think it is one of his most important qualities but also in the work environment. Even if he worked nights or a hard day at work, he smiles and helps you if he can. It was a pleasure to work as a java back-end developer with Max.

rec5.text: While working with Max, he has been an exceptional employee, always eager to learn and develop his skills to get the most out of his job role. Would accept all feed back constructively and improvise to better himself. Ever ready to help and do more to help the team when required. Adaptable and reliable. Max would be an great asset to any organisation and I highly recommend Max for any job role he takes.

skills.lead: A combination of architectural vision and technical mastery. I build systems that not only work, but excel in performance and scalability.

pillars.focus_lead: My experience ranges from the high-computational FinTech sector to the creation of complex E-commerce and Language Portals.

projects.lead: Mastery is demonstrated with facts. Here are some projects I conceived and brought to success.

project1.desc: The tourist train of the city of Nuoro. A restyling project that combines tradition and cutting-edge technology, managing the first contacts of customers such as public and private entities.

project2.desc: Software product designed to optimize the creation and management of quotes.

bottom.title: Ready to bring your vision to life?

item1.title: Software Architecture
item1.desc: Design of complex systems with high availability. Expert in microservices, hexagonal architectures, and domain-driven design (DDD).

item2.title: Backend Engineering
item2.desc: Development of robust and scalable business logic. Specialized in Java ecosystem and legacy systems integration.

item3.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
item3.desc: Modern and automated infrastructures. Focus on release automation, elastic scalability, and data security.

item4.title: Frontend Innovation
item4.desc: Premium user interfaces with a focus on performance and user experience. Maximum attention to code quality and accessibility.

item5.title: API & Integration
item5.desc: Connected and secure API ecosystems. Exploring new frontiers like GraphQL to maximize data efficiency.

item6.title: Security & Compliance
item6.desc: System integrity and regulatory compliance. Implementation of banking and healthcare security standards (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, DORA).

hero.lead: From idea to production, I apply a rigorous framework based on consolidated experience in enterprise contexts to ensure scalability, security, and execution speed.

step1.title: Discovery & Analysis
step1.desc: We define business goals, identify bottlenecks, and design the optimal solution.

step2.title: Architecture & Design
step2.desc: Designing high-performance Cloud-native systems with a focus on security and maintainability.

step3.title: Agile Development
step3.desc: Clean code, automated tests, and continuous releases to ensure quality and total transparency.

step4.title: Monitoring & Evolution
step4.desc: Full system observability and proactive support to scale without compromise.

details.title: Why does a Senior approach make a difference?
details.desc: Many limit themselves to "making the code work". My method focuses on **Long-Term Value**. Well-designed software costs less to maintain and scales without friction.

item1.title: Security by Design
item1.desc: Security is not an option, it is integrated into every line of code from day one.

item2.title: Horizontal Scalability
item2.desc: Architectures ready to handle from 100 to 1,000,000 users without rewriting the core.

item3.title: Compliance & Security
item3.desc: Rigorous management of GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and DORA standards for complex systems.

cta.title: Have a specific project in mind?

hero.lead: Discover how I transformed my digital presence from a traditional site to a high-performance reactive ecosystem, applying the same standards of excellence I offer to my clients.

legacy.label: Legacy (2023)
legacy.title: The Static Architecture
legacy.desc: The previous site suffered from the typical limits of traditional architectures:
legacy.item1: High latency due to full page reloads
legacy.item2: Scalability difficulties for advanced custom features

modern.label: Modern (Today)
modern.title: The New Era: Angular SPA
modern.desc: This version represents the gold standard of modern web development:
modern.item2: Standalone Components for maximum modularity and reuse
modern.item3: Native integration with Cloud & API ecosystems

visual.section_desc: It's not just about aesthetics. The new version was rebuilt from scratch to offer a fluidity that a traditional site cannot reach.

stat1.title: Core Performance
stat1.desc: Lighthouse score improved by 40%. Interactivity time reduced thanks to Lazy Loading.

stat2.title: Type Safety
stat2.desc: Developed entirely in TypeScript to ensure a solid codebase free of runtime bugs.

stat3.title: Component Architecture
stat3.desc: Every element is an atomic component, facilitating continuous testing and updates without downtime.

freelance.title: Freelance Development and Opportunities
freelance.p1: The software development market in Italy is changing rapidly. As a freelance, the main challenge is not just writing quality code, but knowing how to position yourself correctly to intercept companies looking for specific skills.
freelance.p2: Here is a fundamental resource to manage this complexity:

cta.lead: Many only see the graphic change but there is also data stability, frame speed, and memory efficiency. Every line of code is optimized for scalability.
